race.comment: Open race to close out the card. HELLO LOVELY (16) is knocking on the door of another victory placing in three of her past four starts and gets in on the minimum with the claim. Will be rock-hard fit for this and looks the one they all have to run down. SHERAQUAY (14) boasts a win over this course and distance and will get the run of the race from the inside marble. Don't dismiss lightly. SUPERHERO (3) is a bit hit or miss but is more than capable enough on his day. Watch for a spike in form. STATE OPERA (1) was a first-up winner over 1300m at Eagle Farm by a head last time out who shouldn't be underestimated.
